mnemonics: My Nice Unique Names Are Made Up Of 8 Characters
Use Nomenclature To Make Understanding Noticeable Everyday Tasks
keyPoints: A Unix file name can be up to 8 characters long.
File names cannot be '.' or '..' on the root directory.
File names should not end with a space.
Use lowercase letters, numbers and underscores for file names.
Use a dot (.) to separate the directory and file name.
Avoid using special characters in file names.
